response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience across multiple languages and frameworks, with strong TypeScript and React knowledge. His work in energy-related platforms (GISCollective) and renewable-adjacent sectors (Direct Mail automation) aligns well with the job's focus. While his recent roles skew toward senior-level, his depth of practical experience and pragmatic approach suggest a strong fit for a mid-level role.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
Proven track record in scalable systems and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes)
Strong problem-solving and architectural skills with a focus on testability and clean code
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role (extensive senior experience may lead to rapid disengagement)
Limited direct exposure to PostgreSQL (primary requirement) compared to MongoDB
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his freelance/remote-heavy background
